Created attachment 175762
streamlink.shar

NEW PORT: multimedia/streamlink

This is a fork of Livestreamer, having nearly identical functionality but being currently maintained.

Includes Makefile, distinfo and pkg-descr.

Changelog for both 0.0.1 and 0.0.2:
- https://github.com/streamlink/streamlink/releases/tag/0.0.1
- https://github.com/streamlink/streamlink/releases/tag/0.0.2
